name: Chat (Redis Memory) Page
description: v0.6.8 — Renders the Redis-memory chat HTML page. Same chat-ui node as /chat, parameterized for the /chat-memory endpoint family. persistSession=true keeps sessionId in localStorage across reloads so the server-side Redis history stays attached. bodyMode=message tells the client to POST only the latest user turn (server reconstructs history from Redis). Pair with chat-memory-message + chat-memory-stream.
